title: ChargedHeads
description: Get the player's heads in the most vanilla way - with the help of charged creepers
body:
Get the player's heads in the most vanilla way - with the help of charged creepers. The player's head is guaranteed to drop out after his death from a charged creeper #### The plugin is perfect for vanilla servers!
#### ❤️ Icon by [cheharka](https://purcat.monster/)
